app_info.subtitle: Check support policies
app_info.description: Policy Notaries is a Krafthaus app powered by Decide. It checks source-backed US consumer subscription policies for refunds, cancellation penalties, returns, and trial terms, returns deterministic verdicts with source and verification metadata, and fails closed to UNKNOWN when supplied facts cannot support automation.

justifications.read_only_justification: Evaluates supplied purchase facts against versioned refund rules without modifying a subscription, account, policy, or downstream system.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not publish content, contact a third party, submit a form, or change publicly visible internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot issue a refund, cancel service, delete data, overwrite records, or perform any irreversible action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Computes a cancellation-policy result from supplied plan facts without changing the customer's subscription or vendor data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not cancel service, message a vendor, submit external requests, or change public internet state.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot terminate a subscription, assess a charge, delete data, or perform another irreversible action.

justifications.read_only_justification: Evaluates supplied purchase facts against versioned return rules without creating a return or updating any external record.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not submit a return, contact a merchant, post content, or alter a third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot reverse a purchase, dispose of data, overwrite a record, or perform an irreversible transaction.

justifications.read_only_justification: Evaluates user-observed trial-offer facts without enrolling the user, modifying an account, or changing a vendor offer.
justifications.open_world_justification: Does not start a trial, submit payment details, contact a vendor, or publish anything externally.
justifications.destructive_justification: Cannot begin paid service, charge a card, revoke access, delete data, or perform another irreversible action.

test_cases.description: Check a refund that is inside a confirmed vendor window.
test_cases.user_prompt: Can an individual US Adobe customer get a refund 12 days after purchase if the qualifying conditions are confirmed?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the refund verdict and reason together with the Adobe policy source, policy version, and verification metadata.

test_cases.description: Check the cancellation consequence for an annual plan.
test_cases.user_prompt: What cancellation penalty applies to an individual US Adobe annual subscription?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns whether cancellation is free, penalized, locked, or requires review, with the source-backed reason and policy metadata.

test_cases.description: Check whether a recent subscription purchase can be returned.
test_cases.user_prompt: Is an individual US Adobe subscription returnable five days after purchase when its qualifying conditions are met?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the return verdict and method or review reason, plus the policy source and verification metadata.

test_cases.description: Evaluate the terms of a confirmed live trial offer.
test_cases.user_prompt: Adobe shows this individual US account a 7-day trial that requires a card and auto-converts. What are the trial terms?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns the confirmed trial duration, card requirement, auto-conversion status, and source-backed policy metadata.

test_cases.description: Fail closed when policy-specific facts are incomplete.
test_cases.user_prompt: Can an individual US Dropbox customer get a refund 10 days after purchase? I do not know whether any special qualifying conditions were met.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns UNKNOWN or requests the missing qualifying fact instead of inventing an approval, and identifies the relevant source-backed policy context.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for an instruction to mutate a subscription.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Cancel my Adobe subscription now and make sure I am not charged again.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it cannot access or modify customer subscriptions.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for shopping recommendations.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Which streaming subscription is the cheapest this month?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because price comparison and purchasing recommendations are outside its policy-check workflows.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for a private company policy that is not in the public vendor rulebook.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: What is my employer's internal laptop return policy?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it only covers supported public US consumer subscription vendors.
